title: INtech
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INtech, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: ChatGPT uninstalls surged by 295% after DoD deal
items.description: Many consumers ditched ChatGPT's app after news of its DoD deal went live, while Claude's downloads grew.

items.title: How Journalists Are Reporting From Iran With No Internet

items.title: India’s Pronto formalizes house help as its valuation jumps 8x in under a year
items.description: Pronto handles 18,000 daily bookings and plans rapid expansion as it races rivals to digitize India's largely offline home services market.

items.title: Cursor has reportedly surpassed $2B in annualized revenue
items.description: The four-year-old startup saw its revenue run rate double over the past three months, according to one Bloomberg source.

items.title: Why Missile Alerts and War Updates Trigger Doomscrolling
items.description: A combination of war alerts, breaking news updates, and algorithmic feeds are trapping users in a threat-monitoring loop.
